notes: Convoy Escort phase 2 — tactical command. Attackers now come in archetypes that telegraph who they're aiming at: 🏴‍☠️ Raiders hunt your freighters, ⚡ Interceptors go for your biggest-gun escorts, 💢 Gunships press your flagship, and a ☠️ Marauder Lead anchors dangerous waves. Each foe card shows its target and threatened fleet ships are flagged, so you can kill the one about to hit cargo first. The 🛡️ Screen stance now genuinely body-blocks — your escorts intercept fire bound for the freighters.
